name: Padded Vulpix
description:
This was fairly popular on character.ai, based off this image by BunnyKisses on FA Alolan Vulpix by BunnyKisses -- Fur Affinity [dot] net, a POV in a Pokemon Mystery Dungeon setting featuring an Alolan Vulpix wearing a thick poofy diaper
